title: CustomColors
text: CustomColors Custom color definitions as defined with the Microsoft Color dialog box. CustomColors = RGB 1 , RGB 2 , ... RGB 16 Arguments RGB —decimal RGB color definition, for example: 128,0,0 Default value: None File section: [colorbox] Description The value of CustomColors is a set of up to 16 RGB color definitions, each consisting of three numbers representing the red, green, blue values of the color. The following setting defines 4 color definitions. [COLORBOX] customcolors=255,0,128, 13,210,126, 182,39,129, 169,207,167 Copy Related Links Standard Colors Uniface supports standard color definitions including system colors as defined by the operating system, Web colors defined by the W3C, and RGB (red-green-blue) colors expressed in hex or decimal numbers. Any of these color definitions can be used when defining the value of foreground and background colors of components, widgets, panels, and toolbars. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
